ZenithSoC Documentation

System Architecture

  • CPU Complex
  • Instruction Cache
  • Data Cache
  • AXI Bus

Audio Processing Unit (APU)

  • Audio Processing Unit (APU)
  • Audio Capture Unit
  • Audio Synthesis Unit (ASU)

IO Devices

  • GPIO - General Purpose Input/Output
  • UART - Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter
  • SPI - Serial Peripheral Interface
  • Timer
  • Ethernet MAC Controller
  • SD - Secure Digital Card Controller
  • PRNG - Pseudo Random Number Generator
  • Trace Unit

Third-Party Components

ZenithSoC integrates the following third-party components:

ApogeoRV Processor

The ApogeoRV RISC-V processor core is used under its respective license terms. See the ApogeoRV documentation for license details.
